assertions.title: Vector store endpoints automatically opt into the retrieval beta contract

evidence.observation: The rerun test passes and its recorded assertions directly check that the top-level vector-store list request to `/v1/vector_stores?...` and the top-level vector-store search request to `/v1/vector_stores/vs_123/search` both carry `openai-beta: assistants=v2`, closing the previously missing direct proof for list/search header injection.

assertions.title: Vector store file polling helpers respect caller or server poll intervals and preserve failure visibility

evidence.observation: The rerun test passes and directly asserts `x-stainless-poll-helper: true`, `x-stainless-custom-poll-interval: 5` for explicit polling, header-driven delay behavior when only `openai-poll-after-ms` is present, and that `poll(...)`/`create_and_poll(...)` return terminal `failed` and `cancelled` vector-store file objects intact for caller inspection.

commands.observation: Passed the exact rerun for list/search vector-store contract coverage.
Passed the exact rerun for vector-store file polling helper coverage.

summary: Re-ran the two still-relevant vector-store proofs successfully. VAL-FILES-006 now has direct list/search beta-header proof, and VAL-FILES-009 now has direct polling-helper proof for explicit/server intervals plus visible failed and cancelled terminal states.
